overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn/Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a snowy mountain river valley. She wades through turquoise glacial water, walks along rocky banks, and climbs toward a fog-shrouded ridge with dramatic mountain vistas.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow turquoise river with snow-covered banks

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise river water and looking around at the mountain scenery

entered.detail: clear turquoise glacial river with visible rocks beneath the surface
snow-covered riverbanks with patches of exposed rock
rocky shoreline at the water's edge
deciduous trees with orange-brown autumn foliage
tall snow-covered mountain peak visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a shallow turquoise river surrounded by snow-covered banks. Autumn trees with orange foliage line the river sides, and a majestic snow-capped mountain rises in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: character exits the water and steps onto the rocky riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shore with the river to the left, heading downstream

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcrops along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the water onto the rocky riverbank, walking along the shoreline. Large rock formations appear on the right while the river flows to the left, and the distant mountain fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ascent with snow patches and autumn trees

events.description: character begins climbing up rocky terrain away from the river valley
a mountain ram appears briefly on the rocks to the right

agents.ego_description: climbing up rocky outcrops and steep terrain away from the river valley

notable_agents.action: mountain ram with curved horns standing on rocks watching the character pass

entered.detail: evergreen pine trees on the upper slopes
tall reddish-pink grass bushes growing between rocks

segments.scene_description: The character climbs upward through rocky terrain, leaving the river behind. Large boulders dominate the foreground while pine trees and red grass appear on the upper slopes. A mountain ram briefly appears on the rocks to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with thick fog and distant peaks

events.description: thick fog becomes visible in the valley below as the character approaches the ridge edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the mountain ridge toward a foggy overlook with expansive views of the valley below

entered.detail: thick white fog filling the valley below the ridge
distant mountain peaks emerging from the fog

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a snowy mountain ridge with panoramic views. Thick fog fills the valley below, with distant peaks emerging from the mist. The terrain opens up to reveal a dramatic vista while the character walks along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a vibrant river valley to a fog-shrouded mountain ridge. It begins with the character standing in a shallow turquoise river flanked by snow-covered banks and orange autumn foliage, with a majestic snow-capped peak looming in the distance. As the character moves from the water onto the rocky shoreline, the river flows to the left and the distant mountain fades from view behind emerging rock formations. The scene then shifts upward as the character climbs through rugged terrain of large boulders, pine trees, and red grass, passing a mountain ram on the rocks. Finally, the ascent culminates on a snowy cliff edge where the terrain opens into a panoramic vista of distant peaks emerging from a thick blanket of valley fog.
